commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces Discord native-command route-state ReturnType-derived aliases with an exported ConfiguredBindingRouteResult type and an explicit readiness-result union in extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts.

PR surface: Source -1. Total -1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and linked command output rather than a fresh local run. Current main still has the ReturnType/Awaited<ReturnType> aliases in the reported file, and the related issue/PR provide the oxlint no-redundant-type-constituents failure and after-fix output.
